name: ripvec
description: Semantic code search + multi-language LSP. 21 grammars, 26 extensions, function-level PageRank, hybrid BM25+vector ranking. Model2Vec static encoder + TinyBERT cross-encoder reranker, CPU-only. 4.0.1: token_budget allocation for get_repo_map (replaces max_files) — PageRank-proportional byte budget with 40% cap, logarithmic attenuation, and per-file truncated_symbols/truncated_calls telemetry. 4.0: LSP-shaped composability — every tool returns lsp_location; every position tool accepts it.
